title: Cave of the Crystal Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: A sparkling crystal dragon hides a secret in its cave! 💎

q.en: Why do Drake and Rori travel to the village of Greenshire?
q.zh: Drake 和 Rori 为什么要前往格林希尔村？

options.en: To visit the Crystal Cave for fun
options.zh: 去水晶洞游玩

options.en: To meet the Dragon Mage Eko
options.zh: 去见龙法师 Eko

options.en: To find their missing wizard friend Griffith
options.zh: 去寻找失踪的巫师朋友 Griffith

options.en: To rescue a trapped Fire Dragon
options.zh: 去救一只被困的火龙

explain.en: Griffith has disappeared, and Worm senses he is in Greenshire, the village where Griffith was born.
explain.zh: Griffith 失踪了，Worm 感应到他在格林希尔——也就是 Griffith 出生的村庄。

options.en: The wizard who guards the Crystal Cave
options.zh: 看守水晶洞的巫师

options.en: Griffith's cousin from Belerion
options.zh: 来自 Belerion 的 Griffith 的表亲

options.en: A storykeeper-in-training who uses a wheelchair
options.zh: 一位使用轮椅的实习说书人

options.en: The village leader of Greenshire
options.zh: 格林希尔村的村长

explain.en: Llew is the son of Alan the Storykeeper and is training to be a storykeeper; he uses a wheelchair because his legs do not work.
explain.zh: Llew 是说书人 Alan 的儿子，正在学习成为说书人；因为腿部无法活动，他使用轮椅。

q.en: What is special about the crystals growing inside the Crystal Cave?
q.zh: 水晶洞里生长的晶体有什么特别之处？

options.en: They only glow during a full moon
options.zh: 它们只在满月时发光

options.en: They are ordinary rocks with no power
options.zh: 它们是没有魔力的普通石头

options.en: They can only be broken by wizards
options.zh: 它们只能被巫师打碎

options.en: They have magical powers, like giving energy or calming
options.zh: 它们拥有魔力，比如提供能量或让人平静

explain.en: Different crystals have different powers — red ones give energy, light blue ones are calming, and dark purple ones protect secrets.
explain.zh: 不同晶体有不同魔力——红色提供能量，浅蓝色令人平静，深紫色守护秘密。

q.en: What happens when Llew touches the dark purple 'secret-protecting' crystal?
q.zh: 当 Llew 触摸那块深紫色'守护秘密'的晶体时，发生了什么？

options.en: A hidden door outline appears on the wall
options.zh: 墙上出现了一扇暗门的轮廓

options.en: The crystal shatters into dust
options.zh: 晶体碎成了粉末

options.en: It turns bright red
options.zh: 它变成了鲜红色

options.en: Llew becomes invisible
options.zh: Llew 变得隐形了

explain.en: When Llew's fingers touch the purple crystal, it glows and reveals a hidden door on the wall, leading to a secret chamber.
explain.zh: 当 Llew 的手指碰到紫色晶体，它发出光芒，墙上显现出一扇暗门，通向秘密房间。

q.en: Which description best fits the Crystal Dragon, Belydor?
q.zh: 以下哪项最准确地描述了水晶龙 Belydor？

options.en: A small blue Water Dragon
options.zh: 一只小小的蓝色水龙

options.en: A four-legged dragon with no wings and yellow and purple scales
options.zh: 一只没有翅膀、四足、长着黄紫鳞片的龙

options.en: A winged red Fire Dragon
options.zh: 一只长着翅膀的红色火龙

options.en: A green Earth Dragon like Worm
options.zh: 像 Worm 一样的绿色地龙

explain.en: Belydor has four legs and no wings, with shiny yellow and purple scales and golden crystal points on his head and back.
explain.zh: Belydor 有四只脚、没有翅膀，身上是闪亮的黄紫鳞片，头和背上还有金色晶体尖角。

q.en: Who was secretly pretending to be the wizard Morgan?
q.zh: 谁偷偷假扮成了巫师 Morgan？

options.en: Griffith
options.zh: Griffith

options.en: The Dragon Mage Eko
options.zh: 龙法师 Eko

options.en: Gerik, an evil wizard
options.zh: 邪恶巫师 Gerik

options.en: Alan the Storykeeper
options.zh: 说书人 Alan

explain.en: Gerik used a disguise spell to look like Morgan so he could search the cave, but Griffith's spell revealed his true identity.
explain.zh: Gerik 用变形咒伪装成 Morgan 以便搜查洞穴，但 Griffith 的咒语揭穿了他的真面目。

q.en: How do the friends get rid of the red Dragon Stone that was controlling Belydor?
q.zh: 伙伴们是如何处理那块控制着 Belydor 的红色龙石的？

options.en: Worm freezes it into a block of ice
options.zh: Worm 把它冻成了一块冰

options.en: They throw it into the moat
options.zh: 他们把它扔进了护城河

options.en: Vulcan melts it with dragon fire
options.zh: Vulcan 用龙焰把它熔化

options.en: Llew crushes it under the wheels of his wheelchair
options.zh: Llew 用轮椅的轮子把它压碎

explain.en: After Drake passes the stone to Llew, Llew runs over it with his wheelchair, crushing the red stone and freeing Belydor's eyes from its control.
explain.zh: Drake 把龙石传给 Llew 后，Llew 驾驶轮椅从上面碾过，压碎了红石，解除了它对 Belydor 的控制。

q.en: What does Belydor do at the end that shows he has chosen Llew as his Dragon Master?
q.zh: 结尾时 Belydor 做了什么，表明他选择了 Llew 作为自己的训龙师？

options.en: He flies Llew back to Bracken Castle
options.zh: 他载着 Llew 飞回 Bracken 城堡

options.en: He grows a green Dragon Stone from the cave wall for Llew
options.zh: 他从洞壁的晶体中长出一块绿色龙石送给 Llew

options.en: He gives Llew a red crystal
options.zh: 他送给 Llew 一块红色晶体

options.en: He speaks aloud in human words
options.zh: 他用人类语言大声说话

explain.en: Belydor shines light from his eyes onto the wall and grows a green Dragon Stone, which Llew breaks off — signalling Belydor has chosen him.
explain.zh: Belydor 用眼睛发出的光照在墙上，长出了绿色龙石，Llew 把它掰下——这意味着 Belydor 选他做训龙师。

q.en: Why did the evil wizard Gerik come to the Crystal Cave?
q.zh: 邪恶巫师 Gerik 为什么要来水晶洞？

options.en: He was obsessed with crystal magic and wanted to control the Crystal Dragon
options.zh: 他痴迷于晶体魔法，想控制水晶龙

options.en: Griffith invited him to guard the cave
options.zh: Griffith 邀请他来看守洞穴

options.en: He came to train Llew
options.zh: 他是来训练 Llew 的

options.en: He was looking for the Dream Orb
options.zh: 他在寻找梦境宝珠

explain.en: Gerik had studied the cave for years and read a legend about a secret Crystal Dragon, so he made a plan to take Morgan's place and claim its magic.
explain.zh: Gerik 研究这个洞穴多年，还读到关于隐秘水晶龙的传说，于是他计划顶替 Morgan，夺取晶体魔力。

q.en: How does Worm help Llew ride on Vulcan to go deeper into the cave?
q.zh: Worm 如何帮助 Llew 骑上 Vulcan，以便深入洞穴？

options.en: He digs a smooth path for the wheelchair
options.zh: 他为轮椅挖出一条平坦的路

options.en: He shrinks the wheelchair
options.zh: 他把轮椅缩小了

options.en: He uses his mind powers to lift Llew from his wheelchair onto the dragon
options.zh: 他用意念把 Llew 从轮椅上托起，放到龙背上

options.en: He carries Llew in his mouth
options.zh: 他用嘴叼着 Llew

explain.en: Worm's body glows and, using the power of his mind, he lifts Llew out of his wheelchair and onto Vulcan's back.
explain.zh: Worm 身体发光，用意念将 Llew 从轮椅上托起，安稳地放在 Vulcan 背上。
